parameters.text:
AGS X Agent: Kolejka jest pusta. Nie ma co publikowac.

Uzupelnij sekcje ## QUEUE w Notion i uruchom workflow ponownie.

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as post_count FROM engagement_log WHERE action_type='x_post' AND created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({"model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 300, "system": "Check this X post for brand canon compliance. Return JSON only, no markdown: {pass: boolean, violations: string[], em_dash_detected: boolean, char_count: number, reasoning: string}. Violations: em_dash (â€”), empty_enthusiasm (amazing/fantastic/game-changer), fabricated_metrics, over_280_chars, hashtag_overuse, generic_opener, guru_posture. Pass=true only if violations empty AND char_count<=280.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Check this post: " + $json.draft + "\n\nSource insight: " + $json.rawText}]}) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO hitl_sessions (callback_id, execution_id, resume_url, workflow_name, status, expires_at, chat_id, payload)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.callbackId }}',
  '{{ $json.executionId }}',
  '',
  'AGS X Agent v1.0',
  'pending',
  NOW() + (CASE WHEN '{{ $json.priority_esc }}' = 'high' THEN INTERVAL '30 minutes' ELSE INTERVAL '12 hours' END),
  2106351328,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'notionBlockId', '{{ $json.notionBlockId_esc }}'::text,
    'topic', '{{ $json.topic_esc }}'::text,
    'draft', '{{ $json.draft_esc }}'::text,
    'priority', '{{ $json.priority_esc }}'::text
  )
)
ON CONFLICT (callback_id) DO UPDATE
  SET status = 'pending',
      expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
      payload = EXCLUDED.payload
RETURNING id, callback_id;

parameters.content:
## NOTION QUEUE ID
**X Content Queue (AGS X Agent v1.0)**
`371c00c9-0b93-81a0-bc29-e1dc22e5c244`

⚠️ NIE mylić z Intel Brief:
`371c00c9-0b93-8146-...` = Content Engine Intel Brief

Blok API URL:
https://api.notion.com/v1/blocks/371c00c90b9381a0bc29e1dc22e5c244/children

parameters.query: SELECT content FROM published_posts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
